seo_content:
Hantec Trader 20% OFF Instant Deal

Hantec Trader is offering a 20% discount on all Instant Funding accounts using code INSTANT20. This deal allows traders to bypass the evaluation phase entirely and access live simulated capital immediately at a significantly reduced cost. Hantec Trader's Instant Funding model is backed by Hantec Markets — a globally operating, regulated broker — which provides a level of institutional credibility rarely found in the prop trading instant-funding segment.

Hantec Trader is the proprietary trading division of Hantec Markets, a regulated broker with a long operational history across multiple financial jurisdictions. This broker-backed structure means that Hantec Trader's funded accounts are supported by genuine institutional infrastructure: real liquidity, professional execution, and regulatory compliance that standalone prop firms cannot replicate. The firm's Instant Funding product is designed for traders who have already demonstrated competence and want to skip straight to trading with funded capital.

With code INSTANT20, you save 20% on any Hantec Trader Instant Funding account tier. Instant Funding means there is no challenge to pass — your account is activated immediately upon purchase, and you begin trading funded capital from day one. The 20% discount reduces your initial investment significantly, improving your break-even threshold and making it faster to achieve net profitability on your funded account.

Hantec Trader's Instant Funding accounts operate under professional trading conditions backed by Hantec Markets' liquidity infrastructure. Supported platforms include those used across the Hantec group, and instrument access covers the major forex pairs and CFDs available through their institutional network. Trading conditions are designed to reflect real market execution, giving funded traders an authentic experience rather than a purely simulated environment.

To claim this discount, visit Hantec Trader via the link above, navigate to the Instant Funding section, select your preferred account size, and enter INSTANT20 at checkout. The 20% reduction will be applied to your order total immediately. No evaluation or challenge pass is required — your funded account is activated as soon as your purchase is confirmed.
